name: Ultroid UserBot
description: Pluggable telegram userbot, made in python using Telethon.

API_ID.description: Your api id from https://my.telegram.org (required — no shared defaults).

API_HASH.description: Your api hash from https://my.telegram.org (required — no shared defaults).

SESSION.description: Session String (telethon or pyrogram) for your telegram user account. The userbot will NOT work without a session string!!

REDIS_URI.description: Redis host:port only (no redis://). Example: redis-123.example.com:12345

MONGO_URI.description: Optional MongoDB URI (mongodb:// or mongodb+srv://). Use instead of Redis.

DATABASE_URL.description: Optional Postgres URI (postgres://...). Use instead of Redis/Mongo.

BOT_TOKEN.description: Optional assistant bot token from @BotFather. Autopilot can create one if omitted.

LOG_CHANNEL.description: Optional log channel/group id. Autopilot can create one if omitted.

HEROKU_API.description: Heroku API token. Mandatory for Heroku Deploy...

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Name of your Heroku app, given in the first blank on this page. To be added if deploying to heroku ONLY.

ULTROID_AUTO_PIP.description: Allow runtime pip install of missing DB drivers (1/0). Default 1 for back-compat; set 0 on locked hosts.

SKIP_AUTOJOIN.description: Set True to skip auto-joining @TheUltroid on startup.

SKIP_AUTOBOT.description: Set True to skip BotFather bot creation (requires BOT_TOKEN).

SKIP_AUTOPILOT.description: Set True to skip auto log-channel creation (requires LOG_CHANNEL).

SKIP_ASSISTANT_CUSTOMIZE.description: Set True to skip assistant profile customisation at @BotFather.
